changes: OpenClaw shipped stable v2026.4.23 on 2026-04-24 15:19 UTC, keeping the category anchor on a near-daily release cadence.
HiClaw moved from release candidate to stable v1.1.0 on 2026-04-24 07:40 UTC, which is the clearest fresh orchestration signal in this run.
SwarmClaw shipped v1.5.70 and v1.5.71 on 2026-04-24, reinforcing its rapid release cadence.

Hermes Agent did not post a newer release than v2026.4.23, but it climbed to roughly 115.6k stars in the 2026-04-25 scan, while the rest of the set mostly showed routine growth and another PicoClaw nightly build.
whyItMatters: OpenClaw is still setting the release pace, so the core reference remains visibly active rather than coasting on brand.
HiClaw converting its recent release candidate into a stable v1.1.0 matters more than routine star drift because it strengthens the orchestration lane with a concrete shipped milestone.
Hermes continues to accumulate attention fast, but the durable strategic read still holds: learning-loop momentum is real, yet there is still no category break that forces a map or thesis rewrite.
